g.text: H8 Where each gesture goes — 8 motion glyphs, V6.5 window

path.style: stroke: #1a1a1a; stroke-width: 0.6
stroke: #1a1a1a; stroke-width: 0.6

g.text: Mean (x, z) target of the light during each gesture, V6.5 window. Sway, orbit, sweep pull the body outward (z=+18 to +22 cm); the others are postures performed near the panel face. The disc radius = 1 std in target_x (a rough gesture amplitude).
